title: EBOB ve EKOK
subtitle: En buyuk ortak bolen ve en kucuk ortak kat.
code:
<?php

function gcd(int $a, int $b): int {
    while ($b != 0) {
        $temp = $b;
        $b = $a % $b;
        $a = $temp;
    }
    return $a;
}

function lcm(int $a, int $b): int {
    return intdiv($a * $b, gcd($a, $b));
}

$num1 = 48;
$num2 = 18;

echo "Sayilar: " . $num1 . " ve " . $num2 . "\n";
echo "EBOB (GCD): " . gcd($num1, $num2) . "\n";
echo "EKOK (LCM): " . lcm($num1, $num2) . "\n";

// Birden fazla cift icin tablo
echo "\nFarkli sayi ciftleri:\n";
$pairs = [[12, 18], [7, 13], [100, 75], [24, 36]];

foreach ($pairs as $pair) {
    [$a, $b] = $pair;
    echo "GCD(" . $a . "," . $b . ") = " . gcd($a, $b) . ", LCM(" . $a . "," . $b . ") = " . lcm($a, $b) . "\n";
}

?>
